The go:embed pattern must be all:<dir>: plain patterns silently drop
underscore- and dot-prefixed files. A missing embed is its own error.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/assetmapper => ASSETSDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/assets.go --
package web

import "embed"

//fabrik:assets
//go:embed assets
var Assets embed.FS

//fabrik:assets dir=files
var Files embed.FS
-- web/assets/style.css --
body {}
-- want/diags --
error: web/assets.go:5:1: the go:embed pattern does not cover all:assets
  help: use //go:embed all:assets - plain patterns silently drop _-prefixed files (like _variables.css) and dot-prefixed files (like .well-known/), and a missing asset is a runtime 404
error: web/assets.go:9:1: //fabrik:assets variable has no //go:embed
  help: add //go:embed all:files above the variable
